nodes.label: "Missing NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY. Set them in the repo root .env, or let apps/web/next.config.js derive them from SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY."
Missing NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY. Set them in the repo root .env, or let apps/web/next.config.js derive them from SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.
